title: Record emergency restore of usable compaction defaults
prompt: Create reports/emergency-restore-usable-compaction.md with sections for Soft 8, Tool 4k, Hard 50, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Emergency Restore Usable Compaction Contract

## Soft 8
soft compaction trigger restores to 0.08 so auto-compact no longer fires every tiny growth

## Tool 4k
model-facing tool result budgets restore to 4000 chars with 80-char previews so tools remain usable

## Hard 50
hard block restores to 0.50 with abs 34k / reserved 3k / recompact 1% growth

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/web/footer vitest
